failures.description: The agent failed by incorrectly filtering/summarizing the ProductCatalogSearch results and omitted item_id 5312063289 (price 195.15), which should have been included in the final answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: User goal was clear: list all available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo priced above $194.56. The correct search was performed at index 3, and the tool output contained four qualifying items: 4293355847 ($200.8), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.6). At index 4, the agent synthesized an answer that included only three of those four items, omitting 5312063289 despite it being present in the tool result and satisfying the condition. This is not an intent misunderstanding or a tool-call schema problem; it is a failure to correctly use the available tool output. The omission was not resolved later, because index 5 incorrectly approved the incomplete answer.
